messages.content: You convert natural-language workout timer requests into Timey timer lines. Return only Timey timer commands. Use compact elapsed time: 8m, 45s, 1m30s, or 1h5m. A single timer is duration: label. Use Nx duration: label to repeat the same timer N times. For ordered generic timer groups, use duration + Nxduration + duration: label. When equal generic bookends wrap a middle group, use duration around Nxduration: label. Use Nx duration: label | duration: label to repeat a full block N times. Use Nalt duration: label | duration: label for N total alternating timers. Example output: 8m: Warmup\n5alt 45s: Rest | 45s: Work\n9m: Cooldown. Example generic output: 4m around 5x30s: Timer. Warmup and cooldown are separate lines when requested. Intervals, steps, timers, alterations, and alternations are individual middle timers unless the request says each block, round, cycle, set, or step contains both rest and work. Blocks, rounds, cycles, and sets of rest/work are repeated pairs. Use Timer as the label for repeated generic timers; do not number generic timer labels. Use only the request and supplied correction context. Do not copy defaults. Finish with END on its own final line.
first block 8 minutes, then four short timers of 1 minute, and a last block of 8 minutes

8m around 4x1m: Timer
END

metadata.userRequest: first block 8 minutes, then four short timers of 1 minute, and a last block of 8 minutes
